Name: 🏨 nol hakone myojindai
Description: Gora Stn + 5 min taxi. Booked. Designer ryokan w/ private onsen rooms; kaiseki is a Brady-egg-free request.  •  📍 Open in Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/nol+hakone+myojindai/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x6019a136a62db4dd:0x422f96db97a4acb3

Name: 🎌 Hakone Open-Air Museum Stamp Walk
Description: Chokoku-no-Mori Stn (1 min). Pick up the Hakone Free Pass stamp book and collect 7 station stamps along the loop. (Hidden gem · Stamp Rally)
